_comment: Canonical declared brand x platform matrix for build-cadence.yml. Source of truth for which brand+platform pairs MUST stay in the cadence rotation, independent of whether catalog.json has any release history for them yet -- without this, a brand with zero releases (or a platform a brand hasn't shipped on yet) never enters rotation, since the old logic derived pairs purely from existing history (chicken-and-egg). Update this file when a new brand or platform is added. Android is now a first-class branded platform (build-eapp-android.yml): each cadence run ships an APK to the release/catalog and uploads an AAB to Google Play internal track as a DRAFT (play_release_status defaults to draft), which is promoted manually. Web is now also a first-class branded platform (build-eapp-web.yml): each brand builds and deploys to its own Firebase Hosting channel on the shared eapp-live project (evo -> live channel = live.50gramx.com; others -> per-brand preview channel). The generic per-push web deploy in eapp-live is kept only until this is verified, then retired.
